Breaking down its $4B tax bill, slowing growth curve, enterprise vs SMB customers, scalability issues, and more (23:07) Lessons for founders: How ZIRP can skew CAC and LTV calculations, burn multiple (29:40) VC market update: ZIRP mistakes, VC as a...

chunks.text: Stripe's precarious situation: Did it miss its window? Breaking down its $4B tax bill, slowing growth curve, enterprise vs SMB customers, scalability issues, and more
Lessons for founders: How ZIRP can skew CAC and LTV calculations, burn multiple
VC market update: ZIRP mistakes, VC as a "must-have" asset class for LPs, how the 2021 vintage can be saved
AI's outsized impact on SaaS and real-world businesses
Advice from Steve Jobs on customer-first product development, Section 230 update
Trump's savvy visit to East Palestine and 2024 strategy, Biden's visit to Ukraine, China's position

Bestie wrap up!
